-NBM till 4 pm--liquid diet--soft diet
x ray right leg with ankle ap/lateral,-under all aseptic precautions parts scrubbed,painted,draped
-small incision taken anteromedial aspect of distal leg ,dissection done and bone exposed, reduction done
-3.5mm 8 hole locking plate is inserted distal incision and reduction held in position by passing k-wire through the plate at distal site
-another incision taken at proximal end of plate
-proximally plate is fixed with three non locking screws and distally with four locking screws and one 4mm cancelous screw
-checked under carm guidance found stable satisfactory reduction in both ap/lateral view
-wash given
-closure done using 2.0 vicryl and 3.0 ethilon
-sterile dressing applied

Direct snd Indirect Sac on Left side(pantaloon Hernia),omentum as content.,Position: Supine Parts painted and draped. Incision: Inguinal skin crease incision was taken.  External oblique aponeurosis. was .exposed and divided. Upper flap was raised to expose the conjoint tendon. Lower flap was raised to expose the incurved part of the inguinal ligament. Cord and its contents were isolated at the level of pubic tubercle and the cord clamp applied. Indirect hernial sac identified and was dissected away from the cord structures upto the level of the deep ring. The sac was opened all contents reduced. High ligation of the sac was done at the level of deep ring using vicryl 2-0. Posterior wall was plicated with 2-0 vicryl- interrupted. Adequate haemostasis achieved.
